projectDescription: A modern, responsive personal portfolio website showcasing developer skills, projects, and experience
keyFeatures: Responsive single-page design with smooth scrolling navigation
Fixed sidebar profile card with social media links
Portfolio grid showcasing projects with images and categories
Resume section with skills, work experience, and education timeline
Dark theme with customizable color scheme
publicApiSurface: Hero/Profile Section - sidebar with profile image and social links
About Section - personal info and services offered
Resume Section - technical skills, work experience, education timeline
Portfolio Section - project showcase grid with hover effects
Contact Section - form redirecting to WhatsApp plus contact details
Navigation - fixed vertical icon navigation with scroll spy
